visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand outdoors at night in front of a Costco sign. The woman on the left wears a white lace dress and a zebra-pattern bucket hat, gesturing excitedly while the woman on the right in a black dress smiles. (2) The camera pans to a white electric scooter parked nearby with a large green delivery box labeled 'Uber Eats' and '買好市多' (Buy Costco). (3) The scene shifts back to the women standing beside the scooter; the woman in white points at the large green thermal bag with an amazed expression. (4) Close-up shot of the two women as they discuss the details of the service, using hand gestures like the 'OK' sign and thumbs up. The lighting is bright artificial night lighting typical of a parking area.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 誇張! [Slogan]: 免會員費 外送好市多! (2) [Slogan]: 用 Uber Eats 也點的到. (3) [Slogan]: 買好市多 點 Uber Eats. (4) [Variety]: 好大一個. (5) [Slogan]: 不用會員卡 也能消費! (6) [Subtitle]: 但是每樣商品 大約貴30%價格. (7) [Variety]: 是你願意嗎?

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female characters speaking to the camera throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a white sleeveless lace dress and a zebra-print bucket hat; the other wears a black short-sleeved dress with long dark hair.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Outdoor Costco warehouse storefront at night with a parking lot and rows of scooters in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks with rapid, enthusiastic intonation. Upbeat synthesizer music begins instantly. A light 'whoosh' SFX signals a scene transition. (2) The narrator's pitch rises further as she expresses shock at the delivery box size. There is a very low-level background room tone, but speech is dominant. (3) The second speaker joins in, maintaining the high-arousal tone while explaining the 30% price markup for the delivery service. (4) The audio ends with a direct question to the audience, the music swells slightly before a hard cut at the final second.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Feature Breakdown -> Engagement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the new delivery collaboration between Costco and Uber Eats in Taiwan, highlighting the benefit of no membership requirement while noting the 30% price premium.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct promotion of the delivery service, showing the branded vehicle and mentioning the specific apps involved.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-energy short-form social media format to deliver a commercial message, effectively blending information with entertainment.
